_README: This is the ONLY file you edit to teach the assistant. Each intent has `keywords` (trigger words/phrases, lowercase) and EITHER an `answer` (plain text; emails & links become clickable) OR a `source` that pulls live data from the site so nothing is duplicated. Valid sources: about | skills | projects | education | experience | roadmap | contact | languages. Add new intents freely.
name: Aïssa's Assistant
greeting: Hi! 👋 I'm Aïssa's assistant. I can tell you about his skills, projects, education, roadmap, or how to reach him. What would you like to know?
fallback: I can only answer questions about Aïssa — his skills, projects, education, roadmap, or contact info. Try one of these:

intents.answer: Hey there! 👋 Ask me anything about Aïssa — his skills, projects, education, roadmap, or contact details.

Aïssa is focused on AI engineering: building AI agents, RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) pipelines, and integrations with the Model Context Protocol (MCP). He also automates workflows with n8n. These are a core part of his roadmap and his planned projects like the AI Research Agent.
Aïssa is based in Marrakech, Morocco 🇲🇦, and is open to remote work worldwide.
Yes! Aïssa is open to internships, remote roles, and freelance work. The best way to start a conversation is by email — ask me for his contact info.
Aïssa's CV will be available to download from the portfolio soon (🚧 the PDF is being finalized). In the meantime, ask me about his skills, projects, or contact info.
You're welcome! 😊 Anything else you'd like to know about Aïssa?
I'm a lightweight assistant built into this portfolio. I run entirely in your browser using a small local knowledge file — no external AI service — and I only answer questions about Aïssa. 🙂
